data.title: Bitcoin Back Crossed $100,000, Ethereum Hit $4,000: Friday In Review
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets had a bullish Friday, with Bitcoin's surpassing $100,000 for the second time and Ethereum crossing $4,000.

data.title: More Bang For Your Buck Or Less Value for Your Money – What The U.S. Dollar Surge Means For You And Your Wallet
Financial Crime Weekly: CEO Sentenced To 51 Months In Prison, Kiromic BioPharma Charged With Failure To Disclose Material Information
data.description: A CEO is sentenced to 51 months in prison for fraud and ordered to pay $6.1 million in restitution. Kiromic BioPharma is charged with failure to disclose material information.

data.title: Bill Gates Reveals The Childhood Habit That Was Key To His Billion-Dollar Success
data.description: Bill Gates has shared how his childhood habit of reading deeply and focusing for hours without distraction played a pivotal role in his journey to becoming a billionaire, warning that today's tech-driven world could be hindering the development of critical thinking in younger generations.

data.title: Jeff Bezos, World's Second Richest Person, Reveals The Simple Secret To Building Successful Businesses Like Amazon
data.description: Jeff Bezos has shared his approach to achieving massive success, emphasizing the importance of overcoming biases, recognizing underestimated opportunities, and rejecting "thinking small" as it limits potential.
